candidates.thesis: Advanced Micro Devices is a leading player in AI and compute infrastructure, benefiting from secular growth in high-performance computing and data center demand. Strong fundamentals and proximity to 52-week highs indicate robust momentum.

Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing is a critical player in global semiconductor production, with exposure to AI and compute infrastructure growth. Strong technicals and proximity to 52-week highs support the thesis.
CrowdStrike is a leader in cybersecurity with strong secular growth tailwinds as enterprises prioritize digital security. Recent pullback provides an attractive entry point for long-term investors.

ASML is the dominant supplier of semiconductor lithography equipment, benefiting from the global demand for advanced chips in AI and compute infrastructure. Strong fundamentals and technicals make it a high-conviction long-term play.
Marvell Technology is well-positioned to benefit from the growth in AI, cloud computing, and 5G infrastructure. Recent pullback and strong technical setup provide an attractive entry point.
